subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O Cleaver of the Dawn and Sender of the Winds. I bear witness that through Thee the gate of prosperity hath been opened and the path made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا فالق الاصباح و مرسل الریاح اشهد بک فتح باب الفلاح و ظهر سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
